title: 2022-05-10 TidyTuesday NYT titles

theme_set(theme_light())



Show code
library(rmarkdown)

tuesday <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2022-05-10')
## --- Compiling #TidyTuesday Information for 2022-05-10 ----

paged_table(nyt_titles)
